## Content Type

- [ ] Blog post
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Case study
- [ ] Other: ___

## Topic

What should this content cover?

## Target Audience

Who is this for? (developers, lawyers, public, investors)

## Key Points

What must be included?

## Priority

- [ ] Urgent (next cycle)
- [ ] Normal (within 2 weeks)
- [ ] Low (backlog)

## Notes

Any references, sources, or tone guidance.
